tasks.description: Execute acceptance tests for FEATURE-053-A: Structured review of 74 ACs across 16 groups. 1 defect found+fixed (INVALID_SECTION_ID error). Final: 74/74 PASS (100%).

Implement FEATURE-053-A (Application Reverse Engineering Tool Skill): Created 15 skill files via x-ipe-meta-skill-creator delegation (SKILL.md, 3 core templates, 9 mixin files, references, test-cases). Updated extractor category registration. program_type=skills.

Design FEATURE-053-A (Application Reverse Engineering Tool Skill): Two-part design for skill file structure, 8-section phased playbook, collection template, acceptance criteria, 9 mixin files (4 repo-type + 5 language-type), quality scoring weight profiles, verification walkthrough.

Refine FEATURE-053-A (Application Reverse Engineering Tool Skill): Create detailed specification with GWT acceptance criteria for 7-operation contract, 8-section playbook, mixin system, quality scoring, verification walkthrough, tests pipeline, extractor registration.

Break down IDEA-037 (Application Reverse Engineering) into EPIC-053 with single feature FEATURE-053-A. Full scope: 8-section phased playbook, mixin system, quality scoring, tests pipeline, extractor registration.
KB article preview does not render markdown images — `![alt](path)` syntax not converted to `` tags despite image files existing. Fix the KB preview rendering function.

Refine idea 037: Application Reverse Engineering knowledge extraction skill — brainstorm scope, structure, and integration with knowledge extractor. Updated to v1.1: phased extraction order, AAA tests as early knowledge source.

Deep research (2 additional rounds) on X-IPE workflow mode user manual — expanded from 65% to 97% coverage. Round 2: +10 feature files, +8 workflow files. Round 3: CLI vendors, DAO interception, stage gate formula. 53 files total.

Add deep research mode to knowledge extractor (rounds 1-10 or 'smart' auto-exit), new Phase 5.3 iteration step. Update user-manual tool skill for subfolder output (core features + common workflows get per-item files).
Fix workflow .lock files not cleaned up — add cleanup in delete_workflow() and with_file_lock(cleanup=True) in scripts, .gitignore lock files

Update x-ipe-task-based-application-knowledge-extractor: extraction folder naming from opaque IDs (EXTRACT-1028) to meaningful names ({app_name}-{category}, e.g., x-ipe-workflow-mode-user-manual). Updated candidate + production SKILL.md, 3 reference files, 5 new test cases.
Refine idea wf-009-test-greedy-snake: Greedy Snake game — brainstorm, research game design principles, produce structured idea summary. Workflow mode.
